reasoning: Lactate clearance is your primary limiter. Your recent ride showed steady endurance with room to improve during sustained climbs like those on Emigration Canyon. This workout will directly enhance your capacity to maintain target power on the main climb of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5 min at 242-256W, 5 min at 201-218W). Aim to simulate undulating terrain with over-unders.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
